mapper.select: SELECT sc.*, s.name as student_name, s.student_no, c.class_name, s.class_id as s_class_id, sub.subject_name, e.id as exam_id, e.exam_name FROM score_info sc LEFT JOIN student_info s ON sc.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN class_info c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN subject sub ON sc.subject_id = sub.id LEFT JOIN exam e ON sc.exam_id = e.id WHERE sc.id = #{id}

SELECT sc.*, s.name as student_name, s.student_no, c.class_name, s.class_id as s_class_id, sub.subject_name, e.id as exam_id, e.exam_name FROM score_info sc LEFT JOIN student_info s ON sc.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN class_info c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN subject sub ON sc.subject_id = sub.id LEFT JOIN exam e ON sc.exam_id = e.id WHERE s.status = 1 ORDER BY s.student_no ASC, sc.exam_date DESC

SELECT sc.*, s.name as student_name, s.student_no, c.class_name, s.class_id as s_class_id, sub.subject_name, e.id as exam_id, e.exam_name FROM score_info sc LEFT JOIN student_info s ON sc.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN class_info c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN subject sub ON sc.subject_id = sub.id LEFT JOIN exam e ON sc.exam_id = e.id WHERE s.status = 1 LEFT JOIN class_info c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN subject sub ON sc.subject_id = sub.id WHERE sc.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY sc.exam_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO score_info (student_id, subject_id, score, exam_date, exam_id, status) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{subjectId}, #{score}, #{examDate}, #{examId}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE score_info SET student_id = #{studentId}, subject_id = #{subjectId}, score = #{score}, exam_date = #{examDate}, exam_id = #{examId}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE score_info SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO score_info (student_id, subject_id, score, exam_date, exam_id, status) VALUES
(#{item.studentId}, #{item.subjectId}, #{item.score}, #{item.examDate}, #{item.examId}, #{item.status})
mapper.select: SELECT SUM(score) FROM score_info WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status = 1

SELECT sc.exam_date, sc.subject_id, sub.subject_name, sc.score, s.class_id as s_class_id FROM score_info sc LEFT JOIN student_info s ON sc.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN subject sub ON sc.subject_id = sub.id WHERE sc.student_id = #{studentId} AND sc.status = 1
AND sc.subject_id IN
#{sid}
ORDER BY sc.exam_date ASC, sc.subject_id ASC
